50.reason: This loop skips the first node (head) because it moves p to p->next before the first comparison. Additionally, the last node (where p->next is NULL) is never examined, so insertion before the last node is not handled.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition causes last node to be missed and head never compared; insertion order is incorrect]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This loop skips the first node (head) because it moves p to p->next before the first comparison. Additionally, the last node (where p->next is NULL) is never examined, so insertion before the last node is not handled.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The loop logic fails to handle insertion at the head of the list when avex < head->adj, which breaks the ascending order requirement for adjacent vertices during traversal.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: The loop initialization and condition prevent checking the first node. p starts at head->next, making it impossible to insert a smaller value before the head node.

56.reason: [This condition is never true because p has already been moved; head insertion case is never handled]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: p is always head->next or later here, so p==head is never true. The code cannot handle insertion before the first node.

77.reason: Logical error: Fails to maintain sorted order when the list has only one node or when avex should be inserted before the first node, violating the requirement to visit adjacent vertices in ascending order.
